title: Why Are Airline Stocks Down Today?
text: Airline stocks are in decline today due to the storm sweeping across the American south. Hurricane Ian made landfall in Florida yesterday, and could make landfall again soon outside of Charleston, South Carolina.

title: Southwest Airlines COO stepping down amid leadership changes
text: Dallas-based Southwest Airlines announced on Monday that Chief Operating Officer Mike Van de Ven will be stepping down from the role at the end of the month.

title: Upbeat Air-Travel Demand Aids Southwest (LUV), Cost Woes Ail
text: Southwest Airlines (LUV) expects economic fuel costs per gallon for the September quarter in the $3.25-$3.35 range.

title: SOUTHWEST AIRLINES ANNOUNCES LEADERSHIP CHANGES
text: DALLAS , Sept. 26, 2022 /PRNewswire/ --  Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE: LUV) today is celebrating the contributions of President & Chief Operating Officer Mike Van de Ven , an industry veteran and proven Leader, who announced plans to step down from his role as Chief Operating Officer (COO) at the end of September and from his role as President at the end of December.

title: Southwest Airlines hired a record 3,000 flight attendants so far this year
text: Southwest Airlines told staff it's hired and trained 3,000 flight attendants this year.

title: American Airlines Vs. Southwest Airlines: The Battle Of Balance Sheets
text: The airline industry is massively undervalued and many investors start to take a look at which company could be the best choice for the upcoming years. Both American Airlines and Southwest Airlines reported record second quarterly earnings.

title: SOUTHWEST AIRLINES NAMED ONE OF FORBES' 2022 BEST EMPLOYERS FOR WOMEN IN AMERICA FOR FIFTH CONSECUTIVE YEAR
text: Carrier earns recognition for Companywide efforts toward diversity, equity, and inclusion  DALLAS , Sept. 22, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE: LUV) has been named as one of Forbes' 2022 America's Best Employers for Women.

title: SOUTHWEST AIRLINES LAUNCHES LIMITED-TIME TIER STATUS ACCELERATION PROMOTION FOR RAPID REWARDS MEMBERS
text: Carrier surprises Rapid Rewards Members with more ways to earn and maintain  A-List and A-List Preferred tier status through 2023 DALLAS , Sept. 21, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Southwest Airlines Co.  (NYSE: LUV) is rewarding its Rapid Rewards Members for their long-term support by giving them a limited-time incentive, making it easier to earn tier status through 2023.

title: What The U.S. Airline Industry Could Look Like In 2035
text: The airline industry in always changing. By 2035, there will likely be fewer airlines, more airport automation, more efficient fleets, and lower fares for consumers.

title: Guitar Center Partners with Southwest Airlines to Surprise Passengers with Ukuleles and In-Flight Lessons
text: Passengers aboard Southwest Airlines flight from Long Beach to Honolulu were surprised with Mitchell Ukuleles and the first in-flight ukulele lesson taught by Guitar Center instructors LONG BEACH, Calif. , Sept. 17, 2022 /PRNewswire/ --Guitar Center, the world's largest musical instrument retailer, surprised passengers on Southwest Airlines® from Long Beach to Honolulu, with the first-ever in-flight ukulele class by Guitar Center on Friday, September 16.

title: Southwest (LUV) Tweaks Q3 Revenue View on Soft Business Travel
text: Southwest (LUV) anticipates third-quarter 2022 total operating revenues to grow 9-11% from that reported in the September-end quarter of 2019.

title: Southwest Airlines And Allegiant Air: 2 Airlines To Buy On Cracking Demand And Abnormally High Inflation
text: As the cost of living increases, travelers might turn more cost-conscious again. Low-cost carriers are positioned well with ancillary service blocks developed during the pandemic to benefit.

title: Southwest Airlines Sees Strong Demand. Business Travel May Be Coming Back.
text: Business revenues languished well below 2019 levels over the summer but Southwest has seen an improvement so far in September, sentiments echoed by Delta Air Lines.

title: Southwest Airlines seeing 'strong' revenue trends as leisure travel tops expectations
text: Shares of Southwest Airlines Co. LUV, +1.44% rose 0.5% in premarket trading Thursday, after the air carrier said it was seeing "strong" revenue trends for the third quarter, boosted by better-than-anticipated leisure travel and "strong travel demand" for the Labor Day holiday weekend. The company revised its third-quarter revenue guidance to 9% to 11% growth from 2019 levels, compared with previous guidance of 8% to 12% growth.

title: Is Hawaii Paradise or a Money Pit for Southwest Airlines?
text: The discount airline giant is following a questionable strategy in Hawaii.

title: Southwest Airlines (LUV) Announces Tentative Deal With AMFA

title: SOUTHWEST AIRLINES AND AIRCRAFT MECHANICS FRATERNAL ASSOCIATION REACH TENTATIVE AGREEMENT FOR AIRCRAFT APPEARANCE TECHNICIANS
text: DALLAS , Sept. 8, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Southwest Airlines Co.  (NYSE: LUV) and the Aircraft Mechanics Fraternal Association (AMFA), the union that represents Southwest Airlines® Aircraft Appearance Technicians, today announced they have reached a Tentative Agreement.

title: U.S. must do more to block harmful airline mergers, anti-monopoly group says
text: The U.S. Transportation Department (USDOT) must step up efforts to stop anti-competitive U.S. airline mergers and hold carriers accountable for flight cancellations and poor customer service, an influential Washington-based think-thank said on Wednesday.

title: Here's why airline stocks are taking off this week
text: Airline stocks outperformed the broader equity market on Wednesday, getting a boost from a rosier outlook for United Airlines Holdings Inc. and news that U.S. airports recently welcomed more travelers than they had before the pandemic.

title: Holiday air travel tops pre-pandemic levels for the 1st time
text: For the first time since COVID-19 brought air travel to a standstill, the number of people streaming through U.S. airport security checkpoints over a holiday weekend exceeded pre-pandemic levels.

title: SOUTHWEST AIRLINES' COVETED COMPANION PASS IS JUST ONE ROUND TRIP AWAY WITH SPECIAL PROMOTIONAL OFFER
text: Rapid Rewards Members who register, book, and fly can earn a limited-time, promotional Companion Pass for travel between January and March 2023 DALLAS , Sept. 6, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Southwest Airlines Co.  (NYSE: LUV) today announced its promotional Companion Pass® offer is once again back and ready for takeoff.

title: Labor Day weekend air travel surpasses 2019 levels as airlines cap a rocky summer
text: It was the first holiday weekend since the pandemic began that TSA screenings topped 2019 tallies, a milestone in air travel's bumpy recovery.

title: Airlines count on business travelers to keep recovery going
text: With summer vacations winding down, airlines are counting on the return of more business travelers to keep their pandemic recovery going into the fall.
